title: capsicum annuum subsp. abbreviatum
intro: Capsicum annuum subsp. abbreviatum, also known as the dwarf or miniature Thai pepper, is a subspecies of the pepper plant that is characterized by its compact growth habit and small fruit size. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to help with wound healing and the treatment of respiratory infections. The health benefits of Capsicum annuum subsp. abbreviatum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Capsicum annuum subsp. abbreviatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
